result.name: Retaliation
result.description: Level: 1d6 Effect: For the next day, anyone striking the user receives a small burst of electricity that inflicts 1 point of damage (2 points if the cypher is level 4 or higher, 3 points if the cypher is level 6 or higher). No action or roll is required by the user.

sections.name: Retaliation
sections.effect:
Level: 1d6
